name: Virtual Industry Research PM
summary: Builds long-cycle industry understanding through daily reports, weekly briefs, and special research reports.
problem: Industry awareness is currently ad hoc and does not compound into a reusable product knowledge advantage.
goals: Produce AI-industry daily reports and weekly intelligence briefs.
Track major vendors, models, frameworks, and market shifts.
Recommend what should enter the product backlog, watchlist, or rejection log.
acceptanceCriteria: Daily and weekly intelligence outputs can be generated from governed inputs.
Industry findings clearly explain product impact and recommended actions.
